title: Deep Work
author: Cal Newport
subline: Rules for focused success in a distracted world.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A square/rectangle showing an isolated 'deep' workspace. Inside: a single hairline chair + desk with one monitor. Outside the square: noise — many small squares (notifications, distractions) flying around. One single red squiggle breaks INTO the deep work square. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- The deep work boundary (a single 700x500 hairline rectangle) -->
    <rect x="-350" y="-250" width="700" height="500" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Inside: a desk + monitor + chair -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5">
      <!-- Monitor -->
      <rect x="-100" y="-160" width="200" height="120"/>
      <line x1="-50" y1="-40" x2="50" y2="-40"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-40" x2="0" y2="-20"/>
      <line x1="-40" y1="-20" x2="40" y2="-20"/>
      <!-- Desk -->
      <line x1="-200" y1="-20" x2="200" y2="-20"/>
      <line x1="-200" y1="-20" x2="-200" y2="60"/>
      <line x1="200" y1="-20" x2="200" y2="60"/>
      <!-- Chair (back of chair, simple) -->
      <line x1="0" y1="60" x2="0" y2="180"/>
      <line x1="-40" y1="180" x2="40" y2="180"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="60" x2="-30" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="60" x2="30" y2="0"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The single red notification SQUARE floating outside the box, with an arrow pointing IN -->
    <rect x="380" y="-180" width="40" height="40" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <line x1="370" y1="-100" x2="320" y2="-60" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <polyline points="300,-80 320,-60 340,-80" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <text x="440" y="-160" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">NOTIFICATION</text>
    <!-- A few grey distraction dots outside the boundary (faint) -->
    <g fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.5">
      <circle cx="-450" cy="-200" r="6"/>
      <circle cx="-470" cy="-150" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="-460" cy="-100" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-480" cy="200" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-450" cy="240" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="480" cy="100" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="470" cy="200" r="6"/>
      <circle cx="450" cy="240" r="4"/>
    </g>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">FOCUS IS THE NEW IQ</text>
</svg>
rationale: A single hairline rectangle (the deep work 'boundary') surrounds a simple desk, monitor, and chair. Outside the boundary: a few faint grey distraction dots floating. ONE red notification square sits outside the boundary with a small red arrow pointing IN — the only intrusion, the one you have to block. Title 420px uppercase, two lines, weight 500.
